banner.title: JHS Enrollment
banner.subtitle: Welcome to our Junior High School. Start your journey from Grade 7 to 10 here.

options.title: Online JHS Form
options.description: Fill out the digital enrollment form for JHS learners.
options.note: You need to attach the SF9 (JHS Report Card) and PSA Birth Certificate. If the documents are ready, click the button below to start the enrollment process.

options.title: Physical Forms
options.description: Prefer to fill out a paper form? Visit us at the school office for the official DepEd Enrollment Form. Or You can download the official DepEd Enrollment Form by clicking the button below.

requirements.title: JHS Requirements
requirements.subtitle: Please prepare the following documents for Junior High School enrollment:

items.title: PSA Birth Certificate
items.description: Required for incoming Grade 7 and transferees.

items.title: SF9 (JHS Report Card)
items.description: Latest grades from Elementary or previous JHS level.
